mapper.select:
select cp.coupon_num, cp.status, cp.policy_id,
dp.id as dp_id, dp.activation as dp_activation, dp.condition_type as dp_condition_type, dp.discount_type as dp_discount_type, dp.discount_value as dp_discount_value, dp.end_at as dp_end_at, dp.policy_name as dp_policy_name, dp.start_at as dp_start_at
from cinema_kiosk.coupon cp inner join cinema_kiosk.discount_policy dp on cp.policy_id = dp.id
where cp.coupon_num = #{num}
